english translation text: Munajat of Imam Ali (AS)

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ الأَمَانَ يَوْمَ لا يَنْفَعُ مالٌ  وَلابَنُونَ
english translation text: O Allah, I ask You for protection on the day when property will not avail, nor sons

arabic text: إِلاّ مَنْ أَتَىٰ اللهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَليمٍ،
english translation text: except he who comes with a heart free (from evil).

arabic text: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ يَعَضُّ الظّالِمُ عَلىٰ يَدَيْهِ
english translation text: And I ask You for protection on the day when the unjust one will bite his hands

arabic text: يَقُولُ يا لَيْتِني اتَّخَذْتُ مَعَ الرَّسُولِ سَبيلاً
english translation text: saying: O would that I had taken a way with the messenger.

arabic text: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ يُعْرَفُ الْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسيمـاهُمْ
english translation text: And I ask You for protection on the day when the guilty shall be recognised by their marks

arabic text: فَيُؤْخَذُ بِالنَّواصي وَالأَقْدامِ
english translation text: so they shall be seized by the forelocks and the feet.

arabic text: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ لا يَجْزي والِدٌ عَنْ وَلَدِهِ
english translation text: And I ask You for protection on the day when a father shall not give any satisfaction for his son

arabic text: وَلا مَوْلُودٌ هُوَ جازٍ عَنْ والِدِهِ شَيْئاً
english translation text: nor shall the child give any satisfaction for his father,

arabic text: إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللهِ حَقٌّ
english translation text: Surely the promise of Allah is true.

arabic text: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ لا يَنْفَعُ الظّالِمينَ مَعْذِرَتُهُمْ
english translation text: And I ask You for protection on the day when the unjust shall not benefit from their excuse

arabic text: وَلَهُمُ اللَّعْنَةُ وَلَهُمْ سُوءُ الدّارِ
english translation text: and for them is curse and for them is the evil abode.

arabic text: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ لا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِنَفْسٍ شَيْئاً وَالأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ للهِ
english translation text: And I ask You for protection on the day when no soul shall control anything for (another) soul and the command on that day shall be entirely Allah’s.

arabic text: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ يَفِرُّ الْمَرْءُ مِنْ أَخيهِ وَأُمِّهِ وَأَبيهِ وَصاحِبَتِهِ وَبَنيهِ
english translation text: And I ask You for protection on the day when a man shall flee from his brother, and his mother, his father, his spouse, and his children,

arabic text: لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنيهِ
english translation text: each one of them on that day will have a concern which will occupy him.

arabic text: وَأَسْاَلُكَ الأَمانَ يَوْمَ يَوَدُّ المُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدي مِنْ عَذابِ يَوْمَئِذٍ
english translation text: And I ask You for protection on the day when the guilty will wish to redeem himself from the chastisement of that day

arabic text: بِبَنيهِ وَصاحِبَتِهِ وَأَخيهِ وَفَصيلَتِهِ الَّتي تُؤْويهِ وَمَنْ فِي الأَرْضِ جَميعاً ثُمَّ يُنْجيهِ
english translation text: by (sacrificing) his children, and the near of kin who gave him shelter and all those that are in the earth (wising) that this might deliver him ...

arabic text: كَلّا إِنَّها لَظىٰ نَزّاعَةً لِلشَّوىٰ
english translation text: ... by no means! Surely it is a flaming fire, dragging by the head

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمَوْلىٰ وَأَنَا الْعَبْدُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْعَبْدَ إِلّا الْمَوْلىٰ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Master and I am the Slave, and who else can be merciful to the slave except the Master?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمالِكُ وَأَنَا الْمَمْلُوكُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَمْلُوكَ إِلّا الْمالِكُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Owner and I am the one owned by You, and who else can be merciful to the owned except the owner?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْعَزيزُ وَأَنَا الذَّليلُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الذَّليلَ إِلّا الْعَزيزُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Mighty and I am the low, and who else can be merciful to the low except the Mighty?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْخالِقُ وَأَنَا الْمَخْلُوقُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ المَخْلُوقَ إِلّا الْخالِقُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Creator and I am the creature, and who else can be merciful to the creature except the Creator?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْعَظيمُ وَأَنَا الْحَقيرُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْحَقيرَ إِلّا الْعَظيمُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Glorious and I am the miserable, and who else can be merciful to the miserable except the Glorious?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْقَوِيُّ وَأَنَا الضَّعيفُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الضَّعيفَ إِلّا الْقَوِيُّ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Powerful and I am the weak, and who else can be merciful to the weak except the Powerful?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْغَنِيُّ وَأَنَا الْفَقيرُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْفَقيرَ إِلّا الْغَنِيُّ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Wealthy and I am the Poor, and who else can be merciful to the poor except the Wealthy?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمُعْطي وَأَنَا السّائِلُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ السّائِلَ إِلّا الْمُعْطي
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Bestower and I am the beggar, and who else can be merciful to the beggar except the Bestower?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْحَيُّ وَأَنَا الْمَيِّتُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَيِّتَ إِلّا الْحَيُّ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Living and I am the dead, and who else can be merciful to the dead except the Living?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْباقي وَأَنَا الْفاني وَ هَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْفانيَ إِلّا الْباقي
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Eternal and I am the transient, and who else can be merciful to the transient except the Eternal?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الدّائِمُ وَأَنَا الزّائِلُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الزّائِلَ إِلّا الدّائِمُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Permanent and I am the short-lived, and who else can be merciful to the short-lived except the Permanent?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الرّازِقُ وَأَنَا الْمَرْزُوقُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَرْزُوقَ إِلّا الرّازِقُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Provider and I am the blessed, and who else can be merciful to the blessed except the Provider?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْجَوادُ  وَأَنَا الْبَخيلُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْبَخيلَ إِلّا الْجَوادُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Generous and I am the miser, and who else can be merciful to the miser except the Generous?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمُعافي وَأَنَا الْمُبْتَلىٰ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمُبْتَلىٰ إِلّا الْمُعافي
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Healer and I am the afflicted, and who else can be merciful to the afflicted except the Healer?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْكَبيرُ وَأَنَا الصَّغيرُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الصَّغيرَ إِلّا الْكَبيرُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Great and I am the insignificant, and who else can be merciful to the insignificant except the Great?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْهادي وَأَنَا الضّالُّ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الضّالَّ إِلّا الْهادي
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Leading and I am the straying, and who else can be merciful to the straying except the Leading?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الرَّحْمنُ وَأَنَا الْمَرْحُومُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَرْحُومَ إِلّا الرَّحْمنُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Merciful and I am the one shown mercy, and who else can be merciful to the one shown mercy except the Merciful?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يامَوْلايَ أَنْتَ السُّلْطانُ وَأَنَا الْمُمْتَحَنُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمُمْتَحَنَ إِلّا السُّلْطانُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Authority and I am the tried, and who else can be merciful to the tried except the Authority?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الدَّليلُ وَأَنَا الْمُتَحَيِّرُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمُتَحَيِّرَ إِلّا الدَّليلُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Guide and I am the confused, and who else can be merciful to the confused except the Guide?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ وَأَنَا الْمُذْنِبُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمُذْنِبَ إِلّا الْغَفُورُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Forgiver and I am the sinner, and who else can be merciful to the sinner except the Forgiver?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْغالِبُ وَأَنَا الْمَغْلُوبُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَغْلُوبَ إِلّا الْغالِبُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Victor and I am the defeated, and who else can be merciful to the defeated except the Victor?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الرَّبُّ وَأَنَا الْمَرْبُوبُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْمَرْبُوبَ إِلّا الرَّبُّ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the Nourisher and I am the nourished, and who else can be merciful to the nourished except the Nourisher?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ أَنْتَ الْمُتَكَبِّرُ وَأَنَا الْخاشِعُ وَهَلْ يَرْحَمُ الْخاشِعَ إِلّا الْمُتَكَبِّرُ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, You are the High-handed and I am the humble, and who else can be merciful to humble the except the High-handed?

arabic text: مَوْلايَ يا مَوْلايَ اِرْحَمْني بِرَحْمَتِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, O my Lord, have mercy on me by Your mercy,

arabic text: وَارْضَ عَنّي بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ وَفَضْلِكَ
english translation text: and be pleased with me by Your Generosity and Your Magnanimity and Your Grace,

arabic text: يا ذَا الْجُودِ وَالاِحْسانِ وَالطَّوْلِ وَالِإمْتِنانِ
english translation text: O the Generous, and Beneficent, O the Almighty and the Benefactor,

arabic text: بِرَحْمَتِكَ يا اَرْحَمَ الرّاحِمينَ
english translation text: By your Mercy, O the most Merciful of the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
